name: external_body_set_to_seq_forward
reason: element_in_finite_set_exists_in_set_to_seq is external_body — unverified axiom asserting set containment implies to_seq containment

name: external_body_seq_to_set_reverse
reason: element_in_seq_exists_in_original_finite_set is external_body — unverified axiom asserting to_seq containment implies set containment

name: not_in_set_not_in_to_seq
reason: contrapositive of the reverse direction — depends on external_body axiom soundness

name: empty_set_to_seq_empty
reason: empty set should convert to empty sequence — tests base case consistency with the external_body axioms

name: singleton_to_seq_contains_element
reason: singleton set's to_seq should contain the element — tests minimal nontrivial case of the external_body forward axiom
